data.content:
Implementation plan for foolery-41e0:
1) Update `src/components/agent-history-view.tsx` so beat IDs in the History UI are clickable copy targets.
2) Reuse existing clipboard/toast interaction patterns used in other beat views.
3) Provide clear affordance (cursor/title/hover) and non-blocking success/failure feedback.
4) Run focused tests for agent history component behavior if present, then run required quality gates (lint, typecheck, test, build).
Risks: Clipboard API can fail in unsupported contexts; mitigation is error toast and no crash.
